decisions.title_en: NSA revealed using Anthropic Mythos despite Pentagon blacklist
decisions.reason: Previously published 04-17 about Dario Amodei meeting White House chief of staff. New on 04-19: Axios scoop that NSA is actively using Mythos despite Pentagon's 'supply chain risk' designation; 40 organizations have access with 12 named; military agency contradicting DoD's own lawsuit position.

decisions.title_en: Indian fintechs push Anthropic for Mythos access
decisions.reason: Same story_key as NSA scoop (anthropic-mythos-zerodays). NSA development on 04-19 is more significant; India fintech pressure is a narrower angle on the same access-control theme that's already covered by today's NSA entry.

decisions.title_en: Allbirds pivots to NewBird AI GPUaaS, stock surges 600%
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Allbirds sold shoe business and announced $50M convertible to pivot into GPU-as-a-Service; stock surged ~600% intraday. Symbolic of AI compute gold rush swallowing legacy consumer brands.

decisions.title_en: xAI drops Grok 4.3 beta to SuperGrok Heavy, Musk corrects 1T claim
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback (04-17 lookback entry 'xai-xchat-grok5' was about XChat app launch, different story). This is the Grok 4.3 model release. 0.5T checkpoint locked behind $300/mo paywall; Musk corrected initial 1T parameter claim.

decisions.title_en: Alibaba open-sources Qwen3.6-35B-A3B, beats Gemma 4 on every coding benchmark
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. 35B total / 3B active MoE under Apache 2.0; 73.4% SWE-Bench Verified beats Google Gemma 4-31B at 52.0 on every coding benchmark; runs on consumer hardware.

decisions.title_en: Google launches Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS with 200+ audio tags, 70+ languages
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. 1,211 Elo on TTS leaderboard; 200+ audio tags for vocal style/pace control; 70+ languages with SynthID watermarking; available on Google AI Studio, Vertex AI, Google Vids.

decisions.title_en: Opus 4.7 tokenizer uses up to 47% more tokens, flat price hides cost jump
decisions.reason: Previously published 04-16 covered Opus 4.7 launch and SWE-Bench Pro 64.3% score. New on 04-17: token-count analyses (Pawel Jozefiak, ClaudeCodeCamp, decoder.com) reveal new tokenizer breaks same text into 1.32-1.47x more tokens — same nominal $5/$25 rate but real cost rises 0-47% per request, effectively an undisclosed price hike.

decisions.title_en: ChatGPT ads go live in Australia/NZ/Canada for Free and Go tiers
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. First multi-country ad surface for ChatGPT; Free + $8/mo Go tiers only; 600+ advertisers; contextual (not behavioral) targeting; pilot already hit $100M ARR in 2 months.

decisions.title_en: Cloudflare Agent Memory private beta shipped at Agents Week 2026
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Managed service that extracts and recalls information from agent conversations without filling context window; accessible via Worker binding or REST API; closes a core gap for production AI agents.
Already published 04-17 with title 'Anthropic 推出 Claude Design 挑战 Figma'. The 04-18 rollout is just the broader-plan availability, no substantive new information beyond the 04-17 launch coverage.
Already published 04-17 in lookback: 'Cerebras 当日二度申报 IPO，OpenAI 同时曝出 $200 亿采购+最高 10% 股权 warrant'. Same deal covered with same details.
